snippet.title: iPhone 17 Pro vs. 16 Pro: ¡No te equivoques! ⚠️
snippet.description:
Después de un año usando el iPhone 16 Pro y varias semanas con el iPhone 17 Pro, tengo que admitir que… me equivoqué. En este vídeo comparo ambos modelos a fondo: diseño, cámara, batería, rendimiento, problemas reales de uso y, lo más importante, cuál vale la pena comprar en 2025.

Si estás dudando entre comprar el iPhone 16 Pro por su precio más bajo o irte a por el iPhone 17 Pro, este análisis completo te va a ahorrar dinero y dolores de cabeza. Probé ambos en situaciones reales: sol directo, grabación profesional, edición, juegos, rendimiento sostenido, conectividad y autonomía diaria.

¿Es verdad que el iPhone 17 Pro tiene fallos de señal?
¿El nuevo Apple Log 2 y el RAW cambian tanto la cámara?
¿La batería del 17 Pro es realmente tan superior?
Aquí te cuento TODO con transparencia.

📱 Lo más importante que debes saber
 • El iPhone 17 Pro tiene una cámara más profesional (Log 2 + RAW), mejor batería y mejor gestión térmica.
 • El iPhone 16 Pro sigue siendo extremadamente estable, sin los problemas de conectividad que está teniendo el 17 Pro.
 • Si lo encuentras con buen descuento, sigue siendo una compra brutal.
 • Pero sí: Apple este año sí dio un salto, y el 17 Pro es más diferente de lo que muchos creen.

· Síguenos en Instagram: https://instagram.com/saca.technology

snippet.title: SANDMARC Lenses & iPhone 17 Pro
snippet.description:
Learn more: https://www.sandmarc.com/pages/iphone-17-pro-accessories

In this video, we’re diving into our SANDMARC’s full lens lineup, including our telephoto lenses, wide and cinematic lenses, and macro lenses. We’ll show you how to mount them, use them, and why these lenses elevate your iPhone content.

00:00 – INTRODUCTION

00:21 – WHY USE SANDMARC LENSES?

01:16 – TELEPHOTO LENSES

- Telephoto Tetraprism lens (48mm): Designed specifically for the 17 Pro's Telephoto Tetraprism camera, made to double your reach from 8x to 16x zoom, while keeping your shots distortion-free and sharp.

- Telephoto 2x lens (58mm): Our everyday lens used with the main 1x camera.  It’s perfect for lowlight, travel and street portraits with natural bokeh and crisp detail. 

- Telephoto 6x & 10x lenses: Ideal for wildlife, safari trips and for distant landscapes when using the 1x main camera. The built-in focus wheel gives you precise control and helps you achieve a shallower depth of field.

02:08 – WIDE AND CINEMATIC LENSES

- Wide Lens: Provides that ultra-wide 16mm field of view similar to the iPhone’s 0.5x camera, but with the superior quality of the main 48MP sensor. Expect sharper edges and much better low-light performance.

- Anamorphic 1.33x lens delivers that classic cinematic widescreen look with subtle horizontal flares. Perfect for creators looking for a filmic, storytelling aesthetic.

- Anamorphic 1.55x lens: Pushes the cinematic stretch even further, creating a more dramatic widescreen image and pronounced lens flares for a truly immersive feel.

- Fisheye Lens: For the bold and creative. Capturing a 5x wider field of view, great for action shots or immersive POV storytelling.

03:10 – MACRO LENSES
 
- Macro 25mm: Made for extreme close-ups, capturing every texture and fine detail in plants, products, or tiny subjects. Comes included with a hood for diffusing light. 

- Macro 100mm: Offers greater working distance while maintaining macro-level detail, ideal for shooting small subjects without having to get too close.

- Microscope Lens: Provides an incredible 40x zoom with a built-in light for exploring ultra-tiny details. To get sharp focus, you’ll need to be right up against your subject.

- Probe Lens: One of our most unique lenses in the lineup. Its long, narrow design lets you film in spaces where normal cameras wouldn’t fit, for stunning, cinematic perspectives. It includes an integrated light and focus guide for added precision.

04:03 – RECOMMENDED APPS

Lens Compatibility:
iPhone 17 Pro
iPhone 17 Pro Max
iPhone 17 
iPhone Air

snippet.title: Forget iPhone 17 Pro/Max Passcode! iPhone Unavailable on Lock Screen (Without Losing Data)
snippet.description:
Forgot your iPhone passcode and stuck on the iPhone Unavailable lock screen? In this video, I’ll show you the easiest ways to unlock any iPhone without iTunes, without a Mac or PC, and how to reset your device safely. Whether you forgot your iPhone passcode or your iPhone is disabled after too many wrong attempts, these steps will help you get back in quickly.

You’ll learn how to erase and unlock your iPhone using the Forgot Passcode option right from the lock screen, plus how to use Finder on Mac or iTunes on Windows when needed. I’ll also explain when you can restore your data and how to avoid losing your information.

Time to fix your iPhone and get it working again in minutes.

00:00 intro
00:25 Without Mac or PC
00:58 Restore Backup
01:21 Using Mac or PC
02:43 Restore Backup
03:06 Activation Lock - Apple Support

Here are two ways to use an iPhone again after forgetting the lock screen passcode.

Your iPhone data will be erased during this process, so you can’t back it up now. However, you can restore the latest backup if you have it on a Mac or PC and from iCloud if enabled.

First, forget the iPhone passcode without a Mac or PC, Finder, or iTunes.

On the lock screen, tap “Forget Passcode.” Erase or reset the iPhone without the passcode.

Enter your Apple ID account password.

Confirm with “Erase iPhone.” This process erases all media, content, and settings.

snippet.title: Apple iPhone 18 Pro Max vs iPhone 17 Pro Max — Should You Wait? 8 BIG Reasons to Hold Off
snippet.description:
Apple fans and tech enthusiasts, the big question is here: should you upgrade to the iPhone 17 Pro Max now, or wait for the iPhone 18 Pro Max in 2026? 📱 In this video, we break down 8 major reasons why waiting could be the smarter move, covering everything from performance and photography to battery life, connectivity, and design improvements.

We dive deep into:

Dynamic Island redesign — a smaller, cleaner, and more refined front display.

Next-gen A20 2-nanometer chip — massive speed, efficiency, and AI performance improvements.

Photography revolution — variable aperture technology and a Samsung main sensor upgrade.

Battery and connectivity improvements — carbon-based battery cells, C2 chip for 5G, Wi-Fi 7, and Bluetooth efficiency.

Design refinements — subtle translucent ceramic glass over MagSafe for a sleek aesthetic.

Future-proofing — longevity and readiness for next-generation apps and AR experiences.

If you currently own an older iPhone (iPhone 11 or earlier), upgrading to the iPhone 17 Pro Max may still make sense. But for those on newer models like the iPhone 15 or 16 Pro Max, the iPhone 18 Pro Max promises transformative upgrades that may make holding off the smarter choice.

We also cover expected release dates (September 2026), pricing estimates ($1,049 for Pro, $1,249 for Pro Max), and why these improvements could redefine smartphone photography and performance.

Whether you’re a casual user, content creator, or mobile photographer, this video will help you make an informed decision on the next iPhone upgrade.

Welcome to the ultimate review of the Benks ArmorPro Case built with Kevlar® 600D for the iPhone 17 Pro Max! If you’re looking for a premium, rugged, lightweight, and MagSafe-compatible protective case for your latest iPhone, you’re in the right place. In this video, we’ll unbox the ArmorPro, dive into its build quality, materials, drop protection, camera protection, MagSafe compatibility, and whether it’s truly worth it for your iPhone 17 Pro Max.

⸻

✅ What you’ll see in this video
 • Unboxing & first impressions of the ArmorPro Kevlar case for iPhone 17 Pro Max
 • Close-up look at the 600D DuPont™ Kevlar® fiber exterior and TPU shock-absorbing frame.  ￼
 • How the slim design maintains the aesthetic of your iPhone while adding serious protection
 • MagSafe compatibility: built-in magnets ensure seamless use with MagSafe chargers and accessories.  ￼
 • Aluminum camera frame and independent metal buttons for a premium look & feel.  ￼
 • Excimer UV coating for fingerprint & stain resistance.  ￼
 • Real-life drop protection: how does the ArmorPro hold up in everyday use (and beyond)
 • Fit & feel: thickness 1.27 mm, weight approx. 36.4 g for the iPhone 17 Pro Max version.  ￼
 • Who should buy this case and who might prefer something else (e.g., ultra-slim vs rugged)
 • Final verdict: Is the Benks ArmorPro Case the best iPhone 17 Pro Max MagSafe case for tough protection?

⸻

🧩 Key Features & Specs
 • Made with genuine DuPont™ Kevlar® fiber (600D) + TPU frame = high strength, lightweight, scratch and impact resistant.  ￼
 • MagSafe compatible – full MagSafe support ensures charge and accessory alignment.  ￼
 • Aluminum camera lens frame increases protection for your iPhone’s camera module.  ￼
 • Independent metal buttons for tactile feedback & durability.  ￼
 • Excimer UV coating layer: smooth finish, resists stains & fingerprint marks.  ￼
 • Coverage: Designed especially for iPhone 17 Pro Max (as well as other models in the iPhone 17 series) with precise cut-outs & tactile controls.  ￼
 • Protection rating: Benks claims full protection (vs the lighter ArmorAir version) and drop resistance of ~6 ft.  ￼

If you’ve invested in the iPhone 17 Pro Max, you know how important the right case is: one that offers durability without adding bulk, supports MagSafe perfectly, and looks premium. The Benks ArmorPro Case checks those boxes: the Kevlar fiber brings aerospace-grade material into everyday carry, and the design proves tech protection can also be stylish. Whether you’re a heavy-user, travel often, work in rugged environments, or just want top-tier protection for your phone, this case is built to keep your device safe while maintaining full access to MagSafe and all features.
